assertions.scriptName: pg_class namespace OID lookup does not require warmed cache
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
						WHERE c.relnamespace = 2638679668
							AND c.relname = 'testtable';

assertions.scriptName: quoted schema names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE SCHEMA caseschema;

assertions.scriptName: quoted schema names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT nspname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_namespace
						WHERE nspname IN ('CaseSchema', 'caseschema')
						ORDER BY nspname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted database names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE DATABASE "CaseDatabase";

assertions.scriptName: quoted database names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE DATABASE casedatabase;

assertions.scriptName: quoted database names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT datname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_database
						WHERE datname IN ('CaseDatabase', 'casedatabase')
						ORDER BY datname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted table names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE casetable (id INT PRIMARY KEY, label TEXT);

assertions.scriptName: quoted table names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: INSERT INTO casetable VALUES (2, 'folded');

assertions.scriptName: quoted table names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM "CaseTable" ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: quoted table names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM casetable ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: quoted table names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
						WHERE relnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND relname IN ('CaseTable', 'casetable')
						ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
CREATE VIEW caseview AS
						SELECT id, label FROM quoted_view_source WHERE id = 2;

assertions.scriptName: quoted view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM "CaseView";

assertions.scriptName: quoted view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM caseview;

assertions.scriptName: quoted view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
						WHERE relnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND relkind = 'v'
							AND relname IN ('CaseView', 'caseview')
						ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted materialized view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW casematview AS
						SELECT id, label FROM quoted_matview_source WHERE id = 2;

assertions.scriptName: quoted materialized view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM "CaseMatView";

assertions.scriptName: quoted materialized view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM casematview;

assertions.scriptName: quoted materialized view names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
						WHERE relnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND relkind = 'm'
							AND relname IN ('CaseMatView', 'casematview')
						ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted sequence names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE SEQUENCE casesequence;

assertions.scriptName: quoted sequence names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
						WHERE relnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND relkind = 'S'
							AND relname IN ('CaseSequence', 'casesequence')
						ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted column names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT "CaseColumn", casecolumn FROM quoted_column_items;

assertions.scriptName: quoted column names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT attname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'quoted_column_items'::regclass
							AND attname IN ('CaseColumn', 'casecolumn')
						ORDER BY attname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted column names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT column_name
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_name = 'quoted_column_items'
							AND column_name IN ('CaseColumn', 'casecolumn')
						ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT attnum::TEXT,
							attisdropped::TEXT,
							CASE WHEN attisdropped THEN 'dropped' ELSE attname END
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'dropped_column_metadata_items'::regclass
							AND attnum > 0
						ORDER BY attnum;

SELECT attname,
							attlen::TEXT,
							attbyval::TEXT,
							attalign,
							attstorage
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'attribute_type_metadata_items'::regclass
							AND attnum > 0
						ORDER BY attnum;

SELECT attname,
							atthasmissing::TEXT,
							attmissingval::TEXT
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'attribute_missing_value_items'::regclass
							AND attname = 'marker';
SELECT id, marker FROM attribute_missing_value_items;

SELECT attname,
							(attacl IS NULL)::TEXT,
							COALESCE(attacl::TEXT LIKE '{attribute_attacl_reader=r/%}', false)::TEXT
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'attribute_attacl_items'::regclass
							AND attname IN ('id', 'secret')
						ORDER BY attname;

SELECT attname, CAST(attoptions AS TEXT)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'attribute_options_items'::regclass
							AND attname = 'category';

assertions.scriptName: quoted index names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE INDEX caseindex ON quoted_index_items (second_label);

assertions.scriptName: quoted index names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class
						WHERE relnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND relkind = 'i'
							AND relname IN ('CaseIndex', 'caseindex')
						ORDER BY relname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted constraint names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE quoted_constraint_items
						ADD CONSTRAINT caseconstraint CHECK (amount < 100);

assertions.scriptName: quoted constraint names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT conname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'quoted_constraint_items'::regclass
							AND conname IN ('CaseConstraint', 'caseconstraint')
						ORDER BY conname;

assertions.scriptName: quoted function names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
CREATE FUNCTION casefunction(value integer)
						RETURNS integer
						LANGUAGE SQL
						AS $$ SELECT value + 2 $$;

assertions.scriptName: quoted function names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT "CaseFunction"(10), casefunction(10);

assertions.scriptName: quoted procedure names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
quoted procedure names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CALL "CaseProcedure"('one');

assertions.scriptName: quoted procedure names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CALL caseprocedure('two');

assertions.scriptName: quoted procedure names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: SELECT label FROM quoted_procedure_calls ORDER BY label;

assertions.scriptName: quoted domain names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query: CREATE DOMAIN casedomain AS integer CHECK (VALUE < 100);

assertions.scriptName: quoted domain names remain distinct from folded unquoted names
assertions.query:
SELECT typname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type
						WHERE typnamespace = current_schema()::regnamespace
							AND typname IN ('CaseDomain', 'casedomain')
						ORDER BY typname;

SELECT a.attname,
							pg_get_expr(d.adbin, d.adrelid)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attrdef d
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
							ON a.attrelid = d.adrelid
							AND a.attnum = d.adnum
						WHERE d.adrelid = 'attrdef_default_items'::regclass
						ORDER BY a.attnum;

SELECT generation_expression IS NOT NULL
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_name = 'information_schema_generated_items'
							AND column_name = 'doubled';

SELECT attname, attidentity
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'identity_catalog_items'::regclass
							AND attname IN ('always_id', 'default_id')
						ORDER BY attname;

SELECT column_name, is_identity, identity_generation
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_name = 'identity_catalog_items'
							AND column_name IN ('always_id', 'default_id')
						ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT data_type, domain_catalog, domain_schema, domain_name
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_name = 'domain_metadata_items'
							AND column_name = 'amount';

SELECT check_option, is_updatable, is_insertable_into,
							is_trigger_updatable, is_trigger_deletable, is_trigger_insertable_into
						FROM information_schema.views
						WHERE table_schema = 'public'
							AND table_name = 'view_metadata_simple';

SELECT viewowner
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_views
						WHERE schemaname = 'public'
							AND viewname = 'pg_views_owner_reader';

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_viewdef oid integer overload returns definition
assertions.query: SELECT pg_get_viewdef('pg_get_viewdef_wrap_reader'::regclass, 0) IS NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_function helpers render built-in function metadata
assertions.query: SELECT pg_get_function_result(31::oid);

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_function helpers render built-in function metadata
assertions.query: SELECT pg_get_function_identity_arguments(31::oid);

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_function helpers render built-in function metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT pg_get_functiondef(31::oid) LIKE
						'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION pg_catalog.byteaout(bytea)%RETURNS cstring%LANGUAGE internal%byteaout%';

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_function helpers render user-defined function metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							pg_get_function_result(p.oid),
							pg_get_function_identity_arguments(p.oid),
							pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid),
							pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) LIKE
								'CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.introspect_user_function(input_value integer, label text)%RETURNS text%LANGUAGE sql%IMMUTABLE STRICT%SELECT%'
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_proc p
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = p.pronamespace
						WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
							AND p.proname = 'introspect_user_function';
SELECT pg_encoding_to_char(0), pg_encoding_to_char(6);

assertions.scriptName: relation size helpers report stored table and index data
assertions.query:
SELECT
							pg_relation_size('relation_size_items'::regclass) > 0,
							pg_relation_size('relation_size_items'::regclass, 'main') > 0,
							pg_table_size('relation_size_items'::regclass) > 0,
							pg_indexes_size('relation_size_items'::regclass) > 0,
							pg_total_relation_size('relation_size_items'::regclass) > 0;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_backend_memory_contexts
						WHERE level = 0
							AND name = 'TopMemoryContext'
							AND total_bytes >= free_bytes;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_shmem_allocations
						WHERE allocated_size >= size
							AND size >= 0;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_sys_tables
						WHERE schemaname = 'pg_catalog'
							AND relname = 'pg_class';

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_statio_sys_tables
						WHERE schemaname = 'pg_catalog'
							AND relname = 'pg_class';

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_xact_sys_tables
						WHERE schemaname = 'pg_catalog'
							AND relname = 'pg_class';

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_user_functions
						WHERE schemaname = 'public'
							AND funcname = 'stat_user_function_target'
							AND calls >= 1
							AND total_time >= 0
							AND self_time >= 0;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_xact_user_functions
						WHERE schemaname = 'public'
							AND funcname = 'stat_xact_user_function_target'
							AND calls >= 1
							AND total_time >= 0
							AND self_time >= 0;
SELECT count(*) = 1 FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_archiver;
SELECT count(*) = 1 FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_bgwriter;
SELECT count(*) = 1 FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_wal;
SELECT count(*) > 0 FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_slru;

assertions.scriptName: pg_stat_io exposes PostgreSQL 16 columns and rows
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*) = 18
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'pg_catalog.pg_stat_io'::regclass
							AND NOT attisdropped
							AND attname IN (
								'backend_type', 'object', 'context', 'reads', 'read_time',
								'writes', 'write_time', 'writebacks', 'writeback_time',
								'extends', 'extend_time', 'op_bytes', 'hits', 'evictions',
								'reuses', 'fsyncs', 'fsync_time', 'stats_reset'
							);

assertions.scriptName: pg_stat_io exposes PostgreSQL 16 columns and rows
assertions.query: SELECT count(*) > 0 FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_io;

SELECT pg_table_is_visible('visible_first.shadowed_table'::regclass),
						pg_table_is_visible('visible_second.shadowed_table'::regclass);

SELECT 'regtype_schema_first.lookup_domain'::regtype IS NOT NULL,
						'regtype_schema_second.lookup_domain'::regtype IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
							'regtype_lookup_enum'::regtype::text,
							'regtype_lookup_composite'::regtype::text,
							'regtype_lookup_domain'::regtype::text;

SELECT
							to_regtype('to_regtype_lookup_enum')::text,
							to_regtype('to_regtype_lookup_composite')::text,
							to_regtype('to_regtype_lookup_domain')::text;

SELECT
							pg_type_is_visible((
								SELECT t.oid
								FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
								JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
								WHERE n.nspname = 'visible_type_first'
									AND t.typname = 'shadowed_domain'
							)),
							pg_type_is_visible((
								SELECT t.oid
								FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
								JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
								WHERE n.nspname = 'visible_type_second'
									AND t.typname = 'shadowed_domain'
							));

assertions.scriptName: pg_cast exposes built-in integer to bigint cast
assertions.query:
SELECT castsource::regtype::text, casttarget::regtype::text, castcontext, castmethod
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_cast
						WHERE castsource = 'integer'::regtype
							AND casttarget = 'bigint'::regtype;

assertions.scriptName: pg_operator exposes equality merge and hash flags
assertions.query:
SELECT oprcanmerge, oprcanhash
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_operator
						WHERE oprname = '='
							AND oprleft = 'integer'::regtype
							AND oprright = 'integer'::regtype;

assertions.scriptName: pg_language exposes SQL and PLpgSQL languages
assertions.query:
SELECT lanname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_language
						WHERE lanname IN ('sql', 'plpgsql')
						ORDER BY lanname;

SELECT spcname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_tablespace
						WHERE spcname IN ('pg_default', 'pg_global')
						ORDER BY spcname;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_aggregate;

SELECT count(*) > 0
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_init_privs;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER ROLE IN DATABASE SET populates pg_db_role_setting
assertions.query:
SELECT setrole::regrole::text, datname, array_to_string(setconfig, ',')
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_db_role_setting
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_database ON setdatabase = pg_database.oid
						WHERE setrole = 'role_database_setting_catalog'::regrole;

assertions.scriptName: composite types expose pg_type typrelid and pg_class row
composite types expose pg_type typrelid and pg_class row
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relname, c.relkind
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_type t ON t.typrelid = c.oid
						WHERE t.typname = 'composite_catalog_type';
SELECT format_type(0::oid, NULL), format_type(0::oid, 20);

SELECT format_type(atttypid, atttypmod)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'format_type_domain_items'::regclass
							AND attname = 'amount';
SELECT 'regrole_catalog_user'::regrole::text;
SELECT 0::regrole::text;
SELECT 'abs(integer)'::regprocedure::text;
SELECT '+(integer,integer)'::regoperator::text;
SELECT 'english'::regconfig::text;
SELECT 'simple'::regdictionary::text;

SELECT to_regnamespace('pg_catalog')::text,
						to_regnamespace('missing_schema_for_to_regnamespace') IS NULL;

SELECT to_regprocedure('array_in(cstring,oid,integer)')::text,
						to_regprocedure('missing_function_for_to_regprocedure(integer)') IS NULL;

assertions.scriptName: interval typmods round-trip through catalog metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT attname, atttypmod, format_type(atttypid, atttypmod)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'interval_typmod_catalog'::regclass
							AND attnum > 0
						ORDER BY attnum;

assertions.scriptName: pg_class exposes view column and rule metadata

assertions.query:
SELECT rulename
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_rewrite
						WHERE ev_class = 'rewrite_catalog_view'::regclass
							AND rulename = '_RETURN';

assertions.scriptName: column default sequence dependency populates pg_depend
assertions.query:
SELECT d.deptype
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_depend d
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class s ON d.refobjid = s.oid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_attrdef ad ON d.objid = ad.oid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class t ON ad.adrelid = t.oid
						WHERE s.relname = 'depend_catalog_seq'
							AND t.relname = 'depend_catalog_items';

SELECT d.deptype
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_shdepend d
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class c ON d.objid = c.oid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_roles r ON d.refobjid = r.oid
						WHERE c.relname = 'shdepend_catalog_items'
							AND r.rolname = 'shdepend_catalog_owner';

assertions.scriptName: pg_type typsubscript compares to regproc literal
assertions.query:
SELECT t1.oid, t1.typname AS basetype, t2.typname AS arraytype, t2.typsubscript
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t1
						LEFT JOIN pg_catalog.pg_type t2 ON t1.typarray = t2.oid
						WHERE t1.typarray <> 0
							AND (t2.oid IS NULL OR t2.typsubscript <> 'array_subscript_handler'::regproc);
